aLowgradeStoneContai: A low-grade stone containing pure ambient spiritual energy. It serves as standard currency and resource for cultivation burning.
aLowgradeStoneContai1: A low-grade stone containing pure ambient spiritual energy. It serves as standard currency and resource for cultivation burning in the cultivation realm.
acceptSectQuestsToEa: Accept sect quests to earn Contribution and Spirit Stones for rank promotion.
breakAncientArraysTo: Break ancient arrays to harvest ancient inheritances (Costs 1 month).
citySecurityCollapse: City security collapses, mortal bandits roam, dark karma gathers.
closingEyesToFocusOn: Closing eyes to focus on breath, time destiny begins to spin...
cosmosInFluxSpiritua: Cosmos in flux, spiritual fortunes converge, ancient secret realms emerge.
demonicPathSurgesBea: Demonic path surges, beasts grow violent, heavenly secrets are obscured.
exchangeContribution: Exchange Contribution points for artifacts, pills, and techniques.
goToTheMortalWorldFo: Go to the mortal world for trade and auctioning (Costs ${activeCombatConfig?.time_gear?.travel_cost_hp ?? 2} HP, ${activeCombatConfig?.time_gear?.travel_cost_stones ?? 10} Spirit Stones, 1 month).
headerSubtitle: Live through lifetimes, shape your path with choices, and carry inherited power into the next run.
joinTheAuctionHouseT: Join the auction house to bid on rare unique treasures (Costs 1 month).
legacyDescription: Your inherited power persists across runs. Each death makes future lives stronger.
loadingDataDestinyIs: Loading data... Destiny is being recompiled. Are you ready to reconnect to the reincarnation network?
lookForHiddenStallsT: Look for hidden stalls to buy stones and legacy ruins (Costs 1 month).
meditateToAbsorbSpir: Meditate to absorb spiritual energy and breakthrough cultivation. Time will start flowing.
noEvent: No event is ready. Age forward to continue your cultivation.
refineHerbsAndSeizeC: Refine herbs and seize creation, but beware of furnace explosion.
returnSafelyUnderThe: Return safely under the protection of the sect array (Costs ${activeCombatConfig?.time_gear?.travel_cost_hp ?? 2} HP, ${activeCombatConfig?.time_gear?.travel_cost_stones ?? 10} Spirit Stones, 1 month).
sectWarLevelMustBe50: Sect War Level must be > 50 to unlock battlefield cleanup.
spiritualEnergyFlood: Spiritual energy floods mountains, medicinal herbs grow fast, meditation blooms.
techniqueFragmentCol: Technique fragment, collect enough to comprehend.
theDaoCyclesKarmaFlo: The Dao cycles, karma flows, and all techniques align as one.
throughTheMistYouEnc: Through the mist, you encountered a ${activeEvent.nameEn.toLowerCase()}! Make your decision carefully.
travelToTheBustlingC: Travel to the bustling city (Costs ${activeCombatConfig?.time_gear?.travel_cost_hp ?? 2} HP, ${activeCombatConfig?.time_gear?.travel_cost_stones ?? 10} Spirit Stones, 1 month).
travelToTheDangerous: Travel to the dangerous beast mountain range (Costs ${activeCombatConfig?.time_gear?.travel_cost_hp ?? 2} HP, ${activeCombatConfig?.time_gear?.travel_cost_stones ?? 10} Spirit Stones, 1 month).
youAreCurrentlyOnAnA: You are currently on an active quest. Complete or fail your current quest before accepting a new one.
youAttendAnAuctionSe: You attend an Auction seeking treasures.
youEnterCloseddoorMe: You enter closed-door meditation to heal, restoring vitality (+50% HP).
youHuntBeastsAndGath: You hunt beasts and gather herbs in the Beast Mountain Range.
youLeaveTheSectToTra: You leave the sect to travel the outside world seeking serendipity.

youWanderTheBlackMar: You wander the Black Market seeking opportunity.
